tagline: Licensed Pool Consulting, Repair & Safety Evaluations

hero.headline: Code-Compliant Pool Care Done Right
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves more than guesswork. Pool Envy delivers licensed, safety-first repairs, diagnostics, and consulting backed by real credentials and inspector-friendly documentation. Stop worrying about compliance and start enjoying your pool.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Licensed Pool Services You<br class="hidden md:block"> Can Actually Trust
services.subtitle: From safety evaluations to leak detection, every service we deliver is backed by real licenses, CPO certification, and inspector-ready documentation. No shortcuts, no guesswork.

cards.title: Safety & System Evaluations
cards.description: Comprehensive pool inspections with clear, inspector-friendly documentation and a detailed scope of work for repairs or code compliance.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Minimally invasive leak detection using advanced camera and sound technology to pinpoint problems without tearing up your deck or yard.

cards.title: Plumbing Repairs & Repipes
cards.description: Licensed, code-aware pressure testing, targeted plumbing repairs, and full repipes with clean paver and deck restoration every time.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, chlorine feeders — diagnosed and fixed fast. We keep parts in stock so you are not waiting weeks mid-summer.

cards.title: Water Chemistry & Treatment
cards.description: Precise water chemistry analysis and treatment to keep your pool safe, crystal clear, and gentle on skin. No guesswork, just science.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Commercial pool repair, compliance inspections, and safety evaluations for aquatic facilities that need to pass code every time.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Compliant, Safe Pool

steps.title: Book Your Evaluation
steps.description: Start with a paid Safety and System Evaluation. We assess your entire pool system and deliver a clear, inspector-friendly scope of work — no surprises.

steps.title: We Diagnose & Repair
steps.description: Our licensed, CPO-certified team handles everything from leak detection to equipment replacement. We use minimally invasive methods and keep parts in stock.

steps.title: Swim with Confidence
steps.description: Your pool is code-compliant, safe, and swim-ready. You get full documentation for your records, and we are always a phone call away if you need us.

about.label: Why Green Bay Trusts Pool Envy
about.headline: Licensed, Credentialed, and Safety-Obsessed
about.description: Founded in 2020 by Jason Davies, Pool Envy is not your average pool company. We hold WI HVAC/Electrical and Dwelling licenses, CPO certification, and are licensed to operate in Wisconsin, Texas, and Florida. Every project starts with a thorough evaluation because we believe in doing the job right — not just doing it fast. Our code-compliant, safety-first approach means your pool meets every standard, every time.

features.title: Real Licenses & Credentials
features.description: WI HVAC/Electrical License, Dwelling License, CPO Certification, and BBB accreditation. We have the credentials other companies wish they had.

features.title: Safety-First, Always
features.description: Every project starts with a Safety and System Evaluation. We provide inspector-friendly documentation so you know exactly what needs to happen.

features.title: Minimally Invasive Methods
features.description: Our advanced camera and sound leak detection technology finds problems without ripping apart your pool deck. Precision diagnostics, not demolition.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Guesswork.
pricing.subtitle: Every project begins with a paid Safety and System Evaluation so you know exactly what you need — and what it costs — before any work begins.

guarantee.headline: Our "Code-Compliant" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every repair and evaluation we deliver meets or exceeds local building codes and safety standards. If any work we perform does not pass inspection, we come back and make it right at no additional cost. That is not a marketing promise — it is how we operate.

faqs.question: Why do you start with a paid evaluation instead of a free quote?
faqs.answer: A thorough Safety and System Evaluation gives you a clear, inspector-friendly scope of work so there are no surprises. It costs a fraction of what a misdiagnosed repair would, and it ensures every dollar you spend goes toward the right fix.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We are based in Green Bay and serve De Pere, Appleton, and all of Northeast Wisconsin. We also hold licenses in Florida and Texas for clients in those states. Give us a call to confirm service availability in your area.

faqs.question: Are you actually licensed?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold a WI HVAC/Electrical License (#1543940), a WI Dwelling License (#012100046), and CPO Certification. We are also licensed in Florida and Texas, and we are a BBB Accredited Business.

faqs.question: How does your leak detection work?
faqs.answer: We use advanced camera and sound technology to pinpoint leaks with minimal disruption to your pool deck and landscaping. No unnecessary digging or demolition — just precise diagnostics that save you time and money.

faqs.question: Can you help with commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide commercial pool repair, compliance inspections, and safety evaluations for aquatic facilities of all sizes. Our inspector-friendly documentation makes your compliance process straightforward.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Hands down the most passionate and professional team you'll meet. Nobody has more knowledge, experience and enthusiasm for their craft than the Pool Envy team.

testimonials.name: Pool Overhaul Customer
testimonials.text: Jason did a complete overhaul on our pool with a new pump, filter, heater and liner. We are SO HAPPY with the results.

testimonials.name: Green Pool Recovery Client
testimonials.text: These guys are amazing at getting green pools clean. They transformed our severely algae-infected pool to crystal clear. Could not be happier.
